member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Device
member.summary: Generates events and processes commands for the LicketySplit device connected at the specified serial port.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Device.CreateAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the asynchronous API to configure and interface with LicketySplit devices on the specified serial port.
member.param: The name of the serial port used to communicate with the Harp device.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous initialization operation. The value of the parameter contains a new instance of the class.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Device.WhoAmI
member.summary: Represents the unique identity class of the device. This field is constant.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Device.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Device.RegisterMap
member.summary: Gets a read-only mapping from address to register type.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Device.Metadata
member.summary: Gets the contents of the metadata file describing the device registers.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.AsyncDevice
member.summary: Represents an asynchronous API to configure and interface with LicketySplit devices.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.AsyncDevice.ReadLickStateAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the contents of the LickState register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the register payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.AsyncDevice.ReadTimestampedLickStateAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the timestamped contents of the LickState register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the timestamped register payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.AsyncDevice.ReadChannel0TriggerThresholdAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the contents of the Channel0TriggerThreshold register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the register payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.AsyncDevice.ReadTimestampedChannel0TriggerThresholdAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the timestamped contents of the Channel0TriggerThreshold register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the timestamped register payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.AsyncDevice.WriteChannel0TriggerThresholdAsync(System.Byte,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a value to the Channel0TriggerThreshold register.
member.param: The value to be stored in the register.
A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The task object representing the asynchronous write operation.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.AsyncDevice.ReadChannel0UntriggerThresholdAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the contents of the Channel0UntriggerThreshold register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the register payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.AsyncDevice.ReadTimestampedChannel0UntriggerThresholdAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads the timestamped contents of the Channel0UntriggerThreshold register.
member.param: A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation. The property contains the timestamped register payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.AsyncDevice.WriteChannel0UntriggerThresholdAsync(System.Byte,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a value to the Channel0UntriggerThreshold register.
member.param: The value to be stored in the register.
A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The task object representing the asynchronous write operation.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.GetMetadata
member.summary: Represents an operator that returns the contents of the metadata file describing the device registers.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.GetMetadata.Generate
member.summary: Returns an observable sequence with the contents of the metadata file describing the device registers.
member.returns: A sequence with a single object representing the contents of the metadata file.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.GroupByRegister
member.summary: Represents an operator that groups the sequence of " messages by register type.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.GroupByRegister.Process(System.IObservable{Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage})
member.summary: Groups an observable sequence of messages by register type.
member.param: The sequence of Harp device messages.
member.returns: A sequence of observable groups, each of which corresponds to a unique register.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.FilterRegister
member.summary: Represents an operator that filters register-specific messages reported by the device.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.FilterRegister.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Parse
member.summary: Represents an operator which filters and selects specific messages reported by the LicketySplit device.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Parse.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Format
member.summary: Represents an operator which formats a sequence of values as specific LicketySplit register messages.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Format.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickState
member.summary: Represents a register that emits an event when the state of any lick detector changes. Value will be High when lick detected and Low otherwise.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickState.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickState.RegisterType
member.summary: Represents the payload type of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickState.RegisterLength
member.summary: Represents the length of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickState.GetPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns the payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the message payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickState.GetTimestampedPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns the timestamped payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickState.FromPayload(Bonsai.Harp.MessageType,AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickChannels)
member.summary: Returns a Harp message for the register.
member.param: The type of the Harp message.
The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type and payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickState.FromPayload(System.Double,Bonsai.Harp.MessageType,AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickChannels)
member.summary: Returns a timestamped Harp message for the register.
member.param: The timestamp of the message payload, in seconds.
The type of the Harp message.
The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type, timestamp, and payload.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.TimestampedLickState
member.summary: Provides methods for manipulating timestamped messages from the LickState register.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.TimestampedLickState.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.TimestampedLickState.GetPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns timestamped payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0TriggerThreshold
member.summary: Represents a register that threshold value to detect the lick. Values below this threshold will be considered a detected lick.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0TriggerThreshold.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0TriggerThreshold.RegisterType
member.summary: Represents the payload type of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0TriggerThreshold.RegisterLength
member.summary: Represents the length of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0TriggerThreshold.GetPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns the payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the message payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0TriggerThreshold.GetTimestampedPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns the timestamped payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0TriggerThreshold.FromPayload(Bonsai.Harp.MessageType,System.Byte)
member.summary: Returns a Harp message for the register.
member.param: The type of the Harp message.
The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type and payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0TriggerThreshold.FromPayload(System.Double,Bonsai.Harp.MessageType,System.Byte)
member.summary: Returns a timestamped Harp message for the register.
member.param: The timestamp of the message payload, in seconds.
The type of the Harp message.
The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type, timestamp, and payload.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.TimestampedChannel0TriggerThreshold
member.summary: Provides methods for manipulating timestamped messages from the Channel0TriggerThreshold register.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.TimestampedChannel0TriggerThreshold.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.TimestampedChannel0TriggerThreshold.GetPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns timestamped payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0UntriggerThreshold
member.summary: Represents a register that threshold value to release the lick detection state. Values above this threshold will untrigger a detected lick.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0UntriggerThreshold.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0UntriggerThreshold.RegisterType
member.summary: Represents the payload type of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0UntriggerThreshold.RegisterLength
member.summary: Represents the length of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0UntriggerThreshold.GetPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns the payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the message payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0UntriggerThreshold.GetTimestampedPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns the timestamped payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0UntriggerThreshold.FromPayload(Bonsai.Harp.MessageType,System.Byte)
member.summary: Returns a Harp message for the register.
member.param: The type of the Harp message.
The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type and payload.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.Channel0UntriggerThreshold.FromPayload(System.Double,Bonsai.Harp.MessageType,System.Byte)
member.summary: Returns a timestamped Harp message for the register.
member.param: The timestamp of the message payload, in seconds.
The type of the Harp message.
The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type, timestamp, and payload.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.TimestampedChannel0UntriggerThreshold
member.summary: Provides methods for manipulating timestamped messages from the Channel0UntriggerThreshold register.

member.name: F:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.TimestampedChannel0UntriggerThreshold.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.TimestampedChannel0UntriggerThreshold.GetPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns timestamped payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateMessage
member.summary: Represents an operator which creates standard message payloads for the LicketySplit device.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateMessage.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateLickStatePayload
member.summary: Represents an operator that creates a message payload that emits an event when the state of any lick detector changes. Value will be High when lick detected and Low otherwise.

member.name: P:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateLickStatePayload.LickState
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that emits an event when the state of any lick detector changes. Value will be High when lick detected and Low otherwise.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateLickStatePayload.GetPayload
member.summary: Creates a message payload for the LickState register.
member.returns: The created message payload value.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateLickStatePayload.GetMessage(Bonsai.Harp.MessageType)
member.summary: Creates a message that emits an event when the state of any lick detector changes. Value will be High when lick detected and Low otherwise.
member.param: Specifies the type of the created message.
member.returns: A new message for the LickState register.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateTimestampedLickStatePayload
member.summary: Represents an operator that creates a timestamped message payload that emits an event when the state of any lick detector changes. Value will be High when lick detected and Low otherwise.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateTimestampedLickStatePayload.GetMessage(System.Double,Bonsai.Harp.MessageType)
member.summary: Creates a timestamped message that emits an event when the state of any lick detector changes. Value will be High when lick detected and Low otherwise.
member.param: The timestamp of the message payload, in seconds.
Specifies the type of the created message.
member.returns: A new timestamped message for the LickState register.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateChannel0TriggerThresholdPayload
member.summary: Represents an operator that creates a message payload that threshold value to detect the lick. Values below this threshold will be considered a detected lick.

member.name: P:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateChannel0TriggerThresholdPayload.Channel0TriggerThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that threshold value to detect the lick. Values below this threshold will be considered a detected lick.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateChannel0TriggerThresholdPayload.GetPayload
member.summary: Creates a message payload for the Channel0TriggerThreshold register.
member.returns: The created message payload value.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateChannel0TriggerThresholdPayload.GetMessage(Bonsai.Harp.MessageType)
member.summary: Creates a message that threshold value to detect the lick. Values below this threshold will be considered a detected lick.
member.param: Specifies the type of the created message.
member.returns: A new message for the Channel0TriggerThreshold register.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateTimestampedChannel0TriggerThresholdPayload
member.summary: Represents an operator that creates a timestamped message payload that threshold value to detect the lick. Values below this threshold will be considered a detected lick.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateTimestampedChannel0TriggerThresholdPayload.GetMessage(System.Double,Bonsai.Harp.MessageType)
member.summary: Creates a timestamped message that threshold value to detect the lick. Values below this threshold will be considered a detected lick.
member.param: The timestamp of the message payload, in seconds.
Specifies the type of the created message.
member.returns: A new timestamped message for the Channel0TriggerThreshold register.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateChannel0UntriggerThresholdPayload
member.summary: Represents an operator that creates a message payload that threshold value to release the lick detection state. Values above this threshold will untrigger a detected lick.

member.name: P:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateChannel0UntriggerThresholdPayload.Channel0UntriggerThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that threshold value to release the lick detection state. Values above this threshold will untrigger a detected lick.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateChannel0UntriggerThresholdPayload.GetPayload
member.summary: Creates a message payload for the Channel0UntriggerThreshold register.
member.returns: The created message payload value.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateChannel0UntriggerThresholdPayload.GetMessage(Bonsai.Harp.MessageType)
member.summary: Creates a message that threshold value to release the lick detection state. Values above this threshold will untrigger a detected lick.
member.param: Specifies the type of the created message.
member.returns: A new message for the Channel0UntriggerThreshold register.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateTimestampedChannel0UntriggerThresholdPayload
member.summary: Represents an operator that creates a timestamped message payload that threshold value to release the lick detection state. Values above this threshold will untrigger a detected lick.

member.name: M:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.CreateTimestampedChannel0UntriggerThresholdPayload.GetMessage(System.Double,Bonsai.Harp.MessageType)
member.summary: Creates a timestamped message that threshold value to release the lick detection state. Values above this threshold will untrigger a detected lick.
member.param: The timestamp of the message payload, in seconds.
Specifies the type of the created message.
member.returns: A new timestamped message for the Channel0UntriggerThreshold register.

member.name: T:AllenNeuralDynamics.LicketySplit.LickChannels
member.summary: The channel of the lick detector.
